name: Akash Network
description: Decentralized cloud for AI. Deploy AI agents, run LLMs, host apps at 80% less than AWS. Perfect for student founders who need compute without the cloud bills.
claimSteps: Sign up at akash.network/deploy. New users get $100 in free credits. No credit card required to start.

name: Claude
description: Anthropic's Claude Sonnet is free for everyone. Best for complex reasoning, coding, and long documents. Can work across browser tabs with computer use.
claimSteps: Go to claude.ai and sign up. Free tier includes Sonnet with no waitlist.

name: Google Gemini Pro
description: Google's most advanced AI plus 2TB Drive storage. Real-time web browsing, code generation, deep Google ecosystem integration.
claimSteps: Go to gemini.google/students. Verify through SheerID with your personal Gmail. Sign up by April 30, 2026.

name: ChatGPT Plus
description: OpenAI's premium tier with full GPT access, image generation, data analysis, and file uploads. 20% student discount continues after trial.
claimSteps: Go to chatgpt.com/students. Sign up with your .edu email. Verify through SheerID.

name: Perplexity Pro
description: AI research engine that replaces hours of Googling. Direct answers with real citations. Multi-model access. No credit card required.
claimSteps: Go to perplexity.ai. Click Upgrade. Select Educate plan. Sign in with your .edu email.

name: NotebookLM
description: Upload lecture notes, PDFs, YouTube transcripts. AI becomes an expert on YOUR materials. Creates study guides and podcast-style audio summaries.
claimSteps: Go to notebooklm.google.com. Sign in with any Google account. Upload your materials.

name: Cursor Pro
description: AI-powered code editor. Describe what you want in plain English and it writes the code. Reads your entire project, debugs errors.
claimSteps: Download from cursor.com. Sign up with your @babson.edu email. Settings > Subscription > Student Plan.

name: GitHub Copilot
description: AI pair programmer that suggests code as you type. Works in VS Code, JetBrains. Also unlocks dozens of other free developer tools.
claimSteps: Go to education.github.com/pack. Click Get your Pack. Sign in with GitHub. Upload proof of enrollment.

name: Replit
description: Browser-based IDE with AI assistant. Build and deploy apps without setup. AI explains code step-by-step. Great for learning.
claimSteps: Go to replit.com. Sign up free. Free tier includes autocomplete and AI explanations in public apps.

name: Codeium
description: Completely free AI code completion. Unlimited usage for individuals. Rivals GitHub Copilot without the cost.
claimSteps: Go to codeium.com. Sign up free. Install extension for VS Code or your editor.

name: Canva Pro
description: Full Canva Pro with Magic Studio AI. Turn bullet points into presentation decks. AI image generation, background removal, brand kit.
claimSteps: Go to canva.com/education. Verify your student status. Full Pro access activated.

name: Figma
description: Professional design tool with AI features. Create app mockups, pitch deck graphics, prototypes. Industry standard for startups.
claimSteps: Go to figma.com/education. Apply with your .edu email. Full Figma Pro features for free.

name: Leonardo.ai
description: AI image generation with 150 free daily credits. Best for product mockups, concept art, marketing visuals. Professional quality output.
claimSteps: Go to leonardo.ai. Sign up free. 150 fast tokens daily. Great for social media graphics.

name: Ideogram
description: AI image generation with perfect text rendering. Makes posters, banners, social media designs with clear, readable text.
claimSteps: Go to ideogram.ai. Sign up free. 10 slow credits per week. Best for text-heavy graphics.

name: Bing Image Creator
description: DALL-E 3 powered image generation. 100 credits monthly for up to 400 images. No signup needed if you have Microsoft account.
claimSteps: Go to bing.com/images/create. Sign in with Microsoft account. Start creating immediately.

name: Gamma
description: AI presentation builder. Paste your notes, get a polished deck in 60 seconds. Better than PowerPoint for quick investor decks.
claimSteps: Go to gamma.app. Sign up with any email. Free tier gives 400 AI credits (about 40 presentations).

name: Beautiful.ai
description: AI presentation maker with smart templates. Designs adapt automatically as you add content. Export to PowerPoint. Great for investor decks.
claimSteps: Go to beautiful.ai. Sign up free. Free tier includes basic features and templates.

name: Microsoft 365 + Copilot
description: Full Microsoft Office suite plus Copilot AI in Word, Excel, PowerPoint. AI-powered writing, data analysis, presentation generation.
claimSteps: Check if Babson provides this. If not, go to microsoft.com/education and verify with your .edu email.

name: Notion AI
description: AI writing assistant built into Notion. Summarizes notes, generates action items, writes first drafts. Works inside your workspace.
claimSteps: Go to notion.so/students. Sign up with your .edu email. AI features included in free education plan.

name: Grammarly Premium
description: AI writing assistant beyond spell check. Tone detection, clarity improvements, plagiarism checker. Works everywhere you write.
claimSteps: Check if Babson provides this. If not, go to grammarly.com/edu and verify with your .edu email.

name: QuillBot
description: AI paraphrasing tool. Rephrases content into professional language. Free plan includes 2 paraphrasing modes, grammar checker, summarizer.
claimSteps: Go to quillbot.com. Sign up free. Free plan supports 23 languages.

name: Jasper
description: Professional AI copywriting for marketing, emails, ads. 50+ templates. Used by major brands. Great for sales outreach at scale.
claimSteps: Go to jasper.ai. Sign up for 7-day free trial. No credit card for trial.

name: Copy.ai
description: AI copywriting for product descriptions, emails, ads. Over 10 million users. 30+ email marketing templates included.
claimSteps: Go to copy.ai. Sign up free. Limited free tier available.

name: Fathom
description: Best free AI meeting notes. Unlimited recording on free tier. Auto-joins Zoom, Meet, Teams. Creates summaries and action items.
claimSteps: Go to fathom.video. Sign up free. Connect your calendar. Unlimited meetings recorded.

name: Otter.ai
description: AI meeting transcription with 94% accuracy. 300 minutes per month free. Creates summaries and action items automatically.
claimSteps: Go to otter.ai. Sign up free. Connect your calendar. 300 minutes monthly.

name: Fireflies.ai
description: AI meeting assistant with 800 free minutes monthly. 50+ integrations including Slack, Notion, CRMs. Supports 100+ languages.
claimSteps: Go to fireflies.ai. Sign up free. 800 transcription minutes monthly with unlimited storage.

name: Loom
description: Quick video recording for async communication. AI generates titles, summaries, chapters. Great for investor updates and team demos.
claimSteps: Go to loom.com/education. Verify with your .edu email. Full Loom Business features unlocked.

name: Descript
description: Edit video by editing text. AI removes filler words, creates transcripts, clones your voice. Used by podcasters and creators.
claimSteps: Go to descript.com. Sign up free. 1 hour transcription per month. Great for podcast projects.

name: CapCut
description: Best free video editor for TikTok and Reels. AI auto captions, background removal, text-to-video. Mobile and desktop.
claimSteps: Download CapCut from capcut.com. Sign up free. Essential features free including 1080p export.

name: Pika Labs
description: AI video generation with 30 daily credits. Text-to-video and image-to-video. Best free AI for social media video content.
claimSteps: Go to pika.art. Sign up free. 30 credits daily. Great for product demos and ads.

name: Eleven Labs
description: AI voice cloning and text-to-speech. Clone your voice in 30 seconds. 10,000 free characters monthly (about 10 minutes audio).
claimSteps: Go to elevenlabs.io. Sign up free. 10,000 characters per month.

name: Zapier
description: Connect apps and automate workflows without code. When X happens, do Y. 100 free tasks per month.
claimSteps: Go to zapier.com. Sign up free. 100 tasks monthly. Enough for basic startup workflows.

name: Make (Integromat)
description: Visual automation builder, more powerful than Zapier for complex workflows. 1000 free operations per month.
claimSteps: Go to make.com. Sign up free. 1000 operations monthly.

name: n8n
description: Open-source workflow automation. Run unlimited automations on your own server. More powerful than Zapier, completely free.
claimSteps: Go to n8n.io. Self-host free or use cloud free tier. No limits on self-hosted.

name: Tidio
description: AI customer service chatbot. Lyro AI resolves up to 67% of queries automatically. Free forever plan for small teams.
claimSteps: Go to tidio.com. Sign up free. Free plan includes basic AI chatbot functionality.

name: Crisp
description: All-in-one customer messaging. Live chat, chatbot, knowledge base. Free for 2 team members.
claimSteps: Go to crisp.chat. Sign up free. Free plan includes 2 seats and basic chatbot.

name: Julius AI
description: AI data analyst. Turn spreadsheets into charts and insights with no code. Supports Excel, CSV, Google Sheets. Student discount available.
claimSteps: Go to julius.ai. Sign up free. 15 messages per month on free tier.

name: FormulaBot
description: AI-powered Excel and Google Sheets assistant. Generate formulas, analyze data, create charts from plain English.
claimSteps: Go to formulabot.com. Sign up free. Essential features at no cost.

name: Buffer
description: Social media scheduler with AI assistant. Free plan includes 3 channels, 10 posts per channel. AI generates ideas and rewrites.
claimSteps: Go to buffer.com. Sign up free. Connect 3 social channels.

name: Later
description: Visual social media planner. AI-powered captions and hashtag suggestions. Free plan includes 1 profile per network.
claimSteps: Go to later.com. Sign up free. Connect Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn.

name: Bitrix24
description: Free CRM with AI. Organize contacts, automate workflows, track deals. Unlimited users on free tier.
claimSteps: Go to bitrix24.com. Sign up free. Unlimited users, 5GB storage.

name: HubSpot CRM
description: Industry-standard CRM, completely free. Contact management, deal tracking, email templates. AI writing assistant included.
claimSteps: Go to hubspot.com. Sign up free. Full CRM free forever.

name: Mailchimp
description: Email marketing with AI insights. Free up to 500 contacts. AI-driven campaign optimization and audience analysis.
claimSteps: Go to mailchimp.com. Sign up free. 500 contacts, 1000 emails monthly.

name: Bizplanr
description: AI business plan generator. Create investor-ready business plans in minutes. Completely free for all users.
claimSteps: Go to bizplanr.ai. Start creating your business plan immediately. No signup required.

name: Wix ADI
description: AI website builder. Create professional sites without coding. AI generates design based on your answers.
claimSteps: Go to wix.com. Start with AI Design Intelligence. Free plan includes Wix branding.

name: Framer
description: AI-powered website builder for startups. Describe your site, AI builds it. Free plan includes Framer subdomain.
claimSteps: Go to framer.com. Sign up free. AI generates your site from a prompt.

name: Calendly
description: AI-enhanced scheduling. Share your link, people book meetings. Free plan includes 1 event type.
claimSteps: Go to calendly.com. Sign up free. Connect your calendar.

name: Doodle
description: AI scheduling tool for group meetings. Find times that work for everyone automatically.
claimSteps: Go to doodle.com. Sign up free. Create your first poll.

name: Playground AI
description: 1000 free AI image generations per day. Multiple models including Stable Diffusion. Great for product mockups and marketing visuals.
claimSteps: Go to playground.ai. Sign up free. 1000 images daily on free tier.

name: Khanmigo
description: Khan Academy's AI tutor powered by GPT-4. Personalized learning, step-by-step explanations. Great for business math and finance.
claimSteps: Go to khanacademy.org. Access Khanmigo for free. Works in all subjects.

name: Hemingway Editor
description: Free writing editor that makes your writing bold and clear. Highlights complex sentences, passive voice, and readability issues.
claimSteps: Go to hemingwayapp.com. Paste your text. No signup required. Free web version.
